value:
Thanks for reaching out, and I'm sorry you're running into trouble completing your upgrade order. Payment page issues can definitely be frustrating.

A few quick things that often help: try clearing your browser cache and cookies, then refreshing the page—or if you're on mobile, switching to a desktop browser can sometimes resolve these glitches. If you're still stuck after that, I'm happy to help process your upgrade manually so you don't lose momentum. Just let me know your account email and I can take it from there.
